Uses of Class
neqsim.process.fastsimulation.KValueProcessResult

Packages that use KValueProcessResult
Package
Description
neqsim.process.fastsimulation
Fast process-simulation proxies based on cached thermodynamic information from one rigorous base-case run.
neqsim.process.processmodel
 

  • Uses of KValueProcessResult in neqsim.process.fastsimulation

    Methods in neqsim.process.fastsimulation that return KValueProcessResult
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private KValueProcessResult
    KValueProcessSimulator.buildResult(Map<StreamInterface,double[]> streamFlows, Map<String,double[]> sourceFlows, int iterations, double residual, long runTime)
    Builds a named result from identity-keyed stream flows.
    KValueProcessResult
    KValueProcessSimulator.run()
    Runs the fast process simulation at the base-case source flows.
    private KValueProcessResult
    KValueProcessSimulator.runFromSourceFlows(Map<String,double[]> sourceFlows)
    Runs the fixed-point graph simulation from explicit source component flows.
    KValueProcessResult
    KValueProcessSimulator.runWithSourceFlowMultipliers(Map<String,Double> sourceFlowMultipliers)
    Runs the fast process simulation with source-flow multipliers.
    KValueProcessResult
    KValueProcessSimulator.runWithSourceFlowRates(Map<String,Double> sourceFlowRates, String unit)
    Runs the fast process simulation with replacement source total flow rates.

    KValueProcessResult
    ProcessSystem.runFastKValueSimulation()
